chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-475 of 2026 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 04.02.2026. Mr. Rashid Mureed, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, A.A.G. --------------- Mr. Abdullah Nizamani, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent Nos.1 & 2 along with comments. Copy of which has been supplied to counsel for the Petitioner, who submits that an Application has been moved by the Petitioner before the DRAP (Annexure A at Page 11 of the Court file) seeking registration of an Anti-Cancer Drug, which has not been attended to as yet and that such delay is resulting in hardship/prejudice. Counsel appearing on behalf of the DRAP invites attention to paragraph 4, 6, and 12 of the comments submitted in the matter which read as follows: “4. Accordingly, the application of M/s Lab Diagnostic Systems (SMS) Pvt Limited, Taxila, Rawalpindi was placed before the Registration Board in its 351st meeting held on 23- 24 September 2025, wherein the Board directed Biological Evaluation & Research division to issue show cause notice to M/s Hospital Services & Sales, Karachi for cancellation of registration of Cecolin Recombinant Human Papillomavirus Bivalent (Types 16, 18) Vaccine under Section 7 (b) and 42 of the Drug Act, 1976 & Rule 24 of the Drugs Licensing, Registering & Advertising) Rules, 1976 as the drug product manufacturer abroad has terminated the agreement with M/s Hospital Services & Sales, Karachi. Minutes of 351st meeting of Registration Board (Annex-III).

Accordingly, the application of M/s Lab Diagnostic Systems (SMS) Pvt Limited, Taxila, Rawalpindi was placed before the Registration Board in its 351st meeting held on 23- 24 September 2025, wherein the Board directed Biological Evaluation & Research division to issue show cause notice to M/s Hospital Services & Sales, Karachi for cancellation of registration of Cecolin Recombinant Human Papillomavirus Bivalent (Types 16, 18) Vaccine under Section 7 (b) and 42 of the Drug Act, 1976 & Rule 24 of the Drugs Licensing, Registering & Advertising) Rules, 1976 as the drug product manufacturer abroad has terminated the agreement with M/s Hospital Services & Sales, Karachi. Minutes of 351st meeting of Registration Board (Annex-III). 6. M/s Hospital Services & Sales, Karachi on 15.11.2025 through DRAP'S Tracking ID: EYU-AQ8-GB99 submitted Court Order issued by 1st Senior Civil Judge Karachi South dated 13.11.2025 in Civil Suit No. 11277/2025 wherein an ad-interim injunction is granted and the operation, implementation, and further proceedings pursuant to the impugned Show Cause Notice (SCN dated 10.11.2025 are suspended till the next date of hearing by the honorable court. Copy of order dated 13.11.2025 is placed at Annex-VII. 12. Foregoing in view, the Petitioner’s application for product registration shall be processed upon the vacation of the stay Order granted by the 1st Senior Civil Judge, Karachi (South), as highlighted in paragraph 6 above” In view of the stated position, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner would make an application to join the proceeding of the Suit. Under the circumstances, where no dispute remains to be adjudicated in the Petition, the same stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
